operation: First, initialize a workplane on the XY plane, then sketch a circle with a radius of 10 units on this workplane. Next, create a new workplane offset 5 units along the positive Z-axis from the initial workplane, and sketch a concentric circle with a radius of 5 units on this offset workplane. Finally, perform a loft operation between the two circular sketches with the combine parameter enabled to form the final solid model.
geometry: The model is a straight circular frustum (truncated cone) with two parallel, concentric circular faces of different diameters. A smooth, continuous sloped lateral surface connects the edges of the larger base circular face and the smaller top circular face, with the two faces aligned along the same central vertical axis.
function: This conical transition component is suitable for use as a spacer, load-bearing bumper, furniture foot, piping diameter reducer, or any part that requires a smooth structural transition between two different-sized circular mounting surfaces.
